accounts.name: Acme Commerce
accounts.use_case: Acme wants to roll out mobile checkout to 40 regional storefronts after pilot approval.
success_criteria: Mobile checkout works on iOS Safari
QA sign-off shared before pilot start

accounts.name: BetaBio Labs
accounts.use_case: BetaBio plans to launch a WELCOME20 promo campaign tied to checkout release.
success_criteria: Promo code WELCOME20 calculates correct subtotal and tax
Customer support macro ready for launch

accounts.name: OmniCart
accounts.use_case: OmniCart wants to run a mobile checkout conversion A/B test after launch.

accounts.name: Northstar Retail
accounts.use_case: Interested in PM Agent's launch readiness summaries for internal product teams.
success_criteria: Demo can show launch risk across Jira, GitHub, and customer impact

escalations.subject: Acme pilot cannot proceed until mobile checkout is stable
escalations.body: We cannot approve the enterprise pilot while iOS checkout is failing and there is still duplicate charge risk. Please send a clear launch decision and QA sign-off by Tuesday morning.
escalations.requested_action: Delay launch or provide verified fix and QA sign-off.

escalations.subject: Promo campaign depends on correct tax calculation
escalations.body: Our WELCOME20 launch campaign is scheduled for next week. We need confirmation that discounts and tax calculations are correct before enabling checkout traffic.
escalations.requested_action: Confirm tax calculation fix and share test evidence.

escalations.subject: Mobile checkout A/B test needs reliable error states
escalations.body: If failed payments show a spinner forever, conversion data will be noisy. This is not a launch blocker for us, but we need a timeline.
escalations.requested_action: Share ETA for recoverable payment failure state.

customer_impact_summary.recommended_customer_message: We recommend delaying checkout launch by 2 days to complete P0 fixes and QA sign-off. We will provide Acme with a verified fix status and updated pilot timeline by Tuesday morning.
